article_meta.title: Kid Rock Buries Bad Bunny in TMZ's Post-Super Bowl Halftime Show Poll 31 Chris Graythen/Getty ImagesWarner Todd Huston11

reasoning: Solid identification of several clear author-prose bias instances without attributing quotes as author bias. However, it misses notable biased phrases (e.g., 'rabidly anti-Trump rapper', 'frontloaded the poll') and mislabels an unsourced statistic as Bias by Omission instead of Omission of Source Attribution/Unsubstantiated Claims.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items derive from the author's prose; quoted language appears within one selection but is not itself the basis of the bias claim.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Each flagged instance reflects genuine interpretive or loaded author framing; none are neutral or purely quoted.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear biased author phrases like 'rabidly anti-Trump rapper' (subjective/loaded) and 'frontloaded the poll' (spin/intent), plus additional mind-reading about TMZ expectations.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Most labels are reasonable (Spin/Mind Reading), but one item misclassifies an unsourced statistic as Bias by Omission instead of Omission of Source Attribution or Unsubstantiated Claims.
